subject: Re: Nineteen First Avenue | Full Floor Residences | Pre-Construction Pricing
snippet: Hi Nick, Hope you're well! We'll be coming to market soon — here's the indicative pricing: Level 7: $3600000 Level 16: $4410000 Level 23: $5040000 Best regards, Joe On Thu, Sep 25, 2025 at
